channel.title: nuc on DaShaun
channel.description: Recent content in nuc on DaShaun

item.title: Homelab BOM February 2021
item.description: Homelab Redux My homelab is always under construction. Like the dude that is always working on his car, I'm always working on my homelab. I'm always wiping it clean and building it over. I'm always trying out different configurations. I'm swapping out some type of hardware about every 3 months. BOM (4) CompuLab HDMI Display Emulator (fit-headless) 1 2 (4) SanDisk UltraFit 32GB USB 3.
